Philadelphia artist [Joshua Lang](https://twitter.com/joshbwc) from [BWC Sounds](https://www.bwcgarments.com/bwcsounds/) guests and drops a guest mix.

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #382
data.content:
Joe Kay is back in L.A., and ready for his own musical journey.


<!--more-->

Featuring tracks by [oddwin](/artists/oddwin) and [Letherette](/artists/letherette).

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #381 w/ Tom Misch
data.content:
[Tom Misch](https://tommisch.com/) joins Joe Kay for an interview and live performance featuring songs from his debut album "Geography".


<!--more-->

Watch [Interview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FWXDqqPKJAs) and [Live Performance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aAFbvMUD5SU) on YouTube.

Find Tom Misch on [Apple Music](https://geo.itunes.apple.com/us/album/geography/1327772541?mt=1&app=music&at=1010lMz4), [Amazon Music](https://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/product/B07BS65JQX/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&tag=soulectiontracklists-21&camp=1634&creative=6738&linkCode=as2&creativeASIN=B07BS65JQX&linkId=eb8c716078ae79501cff56ff5f98735d), [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/tommisch), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/1uiEZYehlNivdK3iQyAbye) [YouTube](http://www.youtube.com/tommisch), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tommisch/) [Facebook](http://www.facebook.com/tommisch123), and [Twitter](http://www.twitter.com/tommisch)
